name: struct
description: Binary data packing/unpacking for protocol buffers, sensor data, and binary formats.
differences_from_cpython: No 64-bit format support on ESP32 (no 'q', 'Q', 'd'). Use 'i'/'I' for 32-bit.

functions.name: struct.pack
functions.description: Pack values into bytes. fmt: '<' little-endian, '>' big-endian. Types: b/B, h/H, i/I, f, s.

functions.name: struct.unpack
functions.description: Unpack bytes into tuple of values.

functions.name: struct.calcsize
functions.description: Calculate byte size of format string.

functions.name: struct.pack_into
functions.description: Pack into pre-allocated buffer at offset.
